automatedChecks.proves: Deterministic fixtures, exact public projection, working and published continuity, truthful edits, safe deletion, attribution parsing, and fail-closed route guards.

All option and surface combinations pass accessibility and responsive checks, including 320px dense data, frame-controlled reflow, keyboard movement, focus return, publishing, privacy, print, and reduced motion.
72 primary option and surface captures, six explicit states, twelve dense edge cases, and four unchanged-root regressions were freshly captured after source freeze.

automatedChecks.command: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm ds:check
automatedChecks.proves: The final lab passes repository lint, TypeScript, and design-system drift checks.
